selections.name: Sharbino
selections.reason: Resuming after a spell. Has shown ability in stronger provincial and metro maidens. The drop to a country maiden here is a significant class advantage.

selections.name: Slay Queen
selections.reason: Ran a solid 3rd at Canberra last start. Has race fitness on her side and draws well to get a good run in transit.

selections.name: Groundcover
selections.reason: Made up good ground from the back to finish 4th on debut at Canberra. Will appreciate the extra distance here.

selections.name: Burn Sugar Burn
selections.reason: First starter who trialled well when 2nd at Canberra. Can figure in the finish on debut.

danger_horse.name: Piroulette
danger_horse.reason: First starter with four trials under her belt. Wide draw is a negative but market watch is advised.

selections.name: Will The Thinker
selections.reason: Ran a very encouraging 2nd on debut at Nowra on a wet track. Looks a progressive type who should appreciate the step up in trip.

selections.name: Initiate
selections.reason: Consistent mare who comes off a solid 3rd at Sapphire Coast. Gets the inside draw and should be in the finish again.

selections.name: Closethedoordarcy
selections.reason: Drops back from a tougher maiden at Canberra. Capable of sharp improvement in this grade.

selections.name: Passing Through
selections.reason: Faded late at Goulburn last start but draws well here and can run a cheeky race at odds.

danger_horse.name: Arcana Imperii
danger_horse.reason: Second-up. Ran fairly first-up and can improve with fitness.

selections.name: Justifiably
selections.reason: Clear standout after a strong win at Canberra last start over this distance. Form is superior to rivals here.

selections.name: Tavijewel (NZ)
selections.reason: Ran a solid 3rd at Wellington last start. Consistent type who looks the main danger to the favorite.

selections.name: Star Bling
selections.reason: Has been racing consistently without winning. Draws well and should be hitting the line hard late.

selections.name: Threw
selections.reason: Veteran who can mix his form but is capable of sneaking into the placings on his best day.

danger_horse.name: Big Time Charlie
danger_horse.reason: Needs to improve on recent runs but has back class.

selections.name: Farnanheit
selections.reason: Ex-Victorian resuming. Showed ability last prep with a 2nd at Stony Creek. Has trialled well and looks ready to fire.

selections.name: Symbol Of State
selections.reason: Another ex-Victorian. Ran 4th on debut at Colac before failing at Swan Hill. Capable of bouncing back in this company.

selections.name: Reds Express
selections.reason: Ran a nice 2nd at Sapphire Coast two starts back. Draws well and can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Still The Moon
selections.reason: First starter who trialled okay at Canberra. Gets the inside draw and can run a race on debut.

danger_horse.name: Novel Attraction
danger_horse.reason: First starter with multiple trials. Watch betting.

selections.name: You Wish
selections.reason: Massive class drop from a Tab Fed Open at Canberra. Won at Nowra prior to that. Gets the inside draw and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Royal Memory
selections.reason: Coming off a strong win at Goulburn. In good form and looks the main danger.

selections.name: Zoucat
selections.reason: Resuming. Won her maiden well at Sapphire Coast last preparation. Can run well fresh.

selections.name: Eternal Ember
selections.reason: Ran 3rd at Sapphire Coast two starts back. Capable of filling a placing.

danger_horse.name: Spurline
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Has ability but might need the run.

selections.name: Kisses For Jody
selections.reason: Won well at Goulburn last start beating a similar field. Gets the inside draw and can repeat the dose.

selections.name: Missile Defence
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Kisses For Jody last start. Very consistent and will be right in the finish again.

selections.name: Shyamalan
selections.reason: Racing well with a win at Orange and a 3rd at Sapphire Coast recently. Wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: One More Bout
selections.reason: Ran a solid 4th at Goulburn last start. Capable of improvement.

danger_horse.name: Tillman
danger_horse.reason: Veteran who ran 4th behind Kisses For Jody last start. Can place.

selections.name: Soho Sushi
selections.reason: Impressive winner at Goulburn last start. Wide draw is a slight negative but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Zeema
selections.reason: Ran a strong 2nd at Moruya last start. Draws well and looks a major threat.

selections.name: Curly Bend
selections.reason: Solid 3rd at Moruya last time out. Consistent type who should be in the mix.

selections.name: She's The Key
selections.reason: Ran 5th at Goulburn last start. Gets the inside draw and can sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Bourbon Queen
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Has shown glimpses of ability and can run well fresh.
